title: The King's Epic Adventure 3 Act 3
description:
SSSSS Squad Scramble! Tomo Takino Joins the Fray!

The series is not over, just part 3! Please watch Jakabu128's videos, they're starving for views. The FINAL video of Part 3 is finally here! PART 3 IS COMPLETE!!! The King's quest is at another detour when Robotnik's minion emerges. Will the King ever make anyone eat his shit? Find out HERE! Credit goes to Yukari Kanashi for voicing Miyuki, Roboto113 for hating calculus, And me for making the series and an Original character at the end! To my fans, friends, and friends in real life: THANK YOU ALL FOR YOUR LOVING CARE AND SUPPORT!!!!!
